reason: PRD target is ≥90% match but current is 75%. Three major features are completely missing: environment variables ($VAR), command substitution ($(cmd)), and background jobs (&, fg, bg, jobs). These are substantial features requiring significant implementation effort. Even after completing all planned partial-gap tasks (m24: 6 tasks, m25: 3 tasks), estimated PRD match would be ~87%. Reaching 90% requires implementing at least one of the three missing major features, which exceeds current milestone planning capacity.
proposedChange: Option A: Add m26 milestone for 'Environment Variables & Command Substitution' (the two most impactful missing features) — estimated 2-3 weeks of dev work. Option B: Re-scope PRD to mark background jobs as 'future' and accept current trajectory with m24+m25 as sufficient for a revised 90% target. Option C: Accept that PRD ≥90% requires env vars implementation and add it to m25 scope.
